citation: Consumer Protection Act 1999 — Part III (Misleading conduct)
summary: Misleading or deceptive conduct in trade including false product representations is prohibited.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: False origin, fake discounts, or deceptive product descriptions. ACTION: REJECT — correct material misrepresentation. CHECK: Price history, stock availability, and product specs. ESCALATE IF: Systematic consumer deception or regulatory notice received.
